sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n14224" key="a)poflegmatiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀποφλεγμᾰτ-ικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n14224.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">promoting such discharge,</tr_> ibid.</sense> </entryFree>
